sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87848" key="proko/smion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκόσμ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n87848.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frontlet</tr_> of a horse (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προκόμιον</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.970d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
